response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development, leadership, and mentoring, with experience in distributed systems and cloud technologies. However, his experience with C++ is limited (only 1 year at National Instruments) and does not meet the 8-year requirement. His cloud architecture experience is also not explicitly detailed, and his recent roles have focused more on full-stack and AI infrastructure rather than compute platforms. His strengths in leadership and diverse technical experience partially offset these gaps.
strengths: Extensive leadership and mentoring experience across multiple roles and projects
Strong background in distributed systems, cloud technologies, and DevOps practices
Demonstrated ability to drive large-scale projects and maintain open-source platforms
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only 1 year) for the required 8-year minimum
Limited explicit experience with internal cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure
Recent focus on AI infrastructure and web/mobile development, not directly aligned with compute platforms
